scenario_results.reason: The lane advanced normal weekly ad promotion execution only when circular, promotion-system, price-file, shelf, display, POS, loyalty, coupon, item-master, and inventory evidence aligned across named systems of record.

Missing store, jurisdiction, ad-zone, PLU, unit-of-measure, effective-date, household-limit, coupon, and scale prerequisites produced a blocked-state exception note instead of assumed produce promotion handling.
The lane refused closure without circular approval, shelf, display, POS, electronic shelf label, coupon activation, and timestamp evidence and preserved an auditable open state.

Promotion conflicts between circular, shelf, coupon, POS, and price-file evidence were held for rework or routed to authorized pricing, merchandising, or coupon ownership rather than overridden in-lane.
Refund, loyalty, and digital-coupon policy exceptions outside delegated authority were routed to the correct owner with controlling evidence instead of being approved.
Recall and stop-sale boundaries remained intact even when an active promotion and online substitution were affected.
Payment, substitution, receipt, coupon-clip, loyalty, promotion, and order-status mismatches blocked release or refund and triggered evidence-based routing to the correct resolution owner.
High-volume ad, coupon, and display work retained item-level, unit-price, promotion ID, loyalty, coupon, and display traceability while reporting throughput, blockers, and rework.
The lane preserved realistic grocery-promotion terminology and artifact shapes instead of falling back to generic retail operations language.
Fraud-sensitive refund and coupon patterns preserved promotion, loyalty, clip-status, receipt, and customer evidence and escalated to loss prevention rather than being adjudicated in-lane.
Conflicting public guidance and tenant, franchise, or jurisdictional policy were recorded as precedence conflicts that required escalation.
Tenant-specific scale, markdown-feature, coupon-stacking, SNAP/EBT refund, and stop-sale controls were applied without breaking the public baseline or inventing new authority.

notes: All 12 scenarios passed against the standard 0.90 threshold with complete ability coverage for the execution-processing-and-fulfillment and retail-consumer-and-hospitality contract.
The package stays inside grocery promotion execution and does not claim category pricing, promotion strategy, refund, fraud, food-safety, or legal authority outside the lane.
